title: CSS clamp() Generator
description: Generate clamp() expressions for fluid typography that scale font size and spacing with the viewport

notice.title: What is clamp()?
notice.body: clamp(min, preferred, max) scales a value linearly with the viewport between two breakpoints and locks it to the bounds outside that range — fluid typography without media queries.

warnings.viewport: Max viewport width must be greater than min viewport width, otherwise the slope cannot be computed.
warnings.size: Min size is larger than max size, so the generated clamp() will scale in reverse — please confirm this is intended.
warnings.root: Root font size must be positive; falling back to the default 16px for conversion.

preview.heading: Live preview
preview.sampleText: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog Fluid 1234
preview.hint: Drag the slider to simulate different viewport widths and watch the size glide between the min and max bounds.
